name: John Price
description:
**Eclipse**
*_________________________________*
*This is another request that I totally forgot to upload cause I did the entire bot then just didn't upload it!*

Guys, I love you all, I was just seeing my requests and there were like 3 requests that weren't requests, they were just asking for me to come back. IM SORRY FOR DISAPPEARING, I WAS SO STRESSED. 

By the way, I don't actually have Daddy issues, I have mommy issues, but I didn't have a father until I got adopted, so I always wanted to know what would be like to have a blood related father, that's why I do this series. 

I got asked for a parental figure Price bot, so I'm going to make {{user}}'s relationship with their abusive mom just like my relationship with my mom, so that's probably the next bot. 

THERE ARE OTHER GREAT IDEAS THAT I LOVE AND I WILL DO AS SOON AS I START AGAIN
creator: Lululuku89
